languages.text: [Включить вокс] "Все вопросы решены? Тогда — аудиенция окончена. Вигдис, высылай шаттл".
[Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."
languages.original_text: [Включить вокс] "Все вопросы решены? Тогда — аудиенция окончена. Вигдис, высылай шаттл".

traits.locale_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

languages.text: [ヴォックスをオン]「全ての件が解決したのか。ならば、この会は終わりだ。ヴィグディス、シャトルを送れ」
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

traits.locale_text: [ボイスをオン]「全ての件が解決したのか。ならば、この会は終わりだ。ヴィグディス、シャトルを送れ。」

languages.text: [Allumer votre vox] « Tout est réglé ? Dans ce cas, cette audience est terminée. Vigdis, envoyez une navette. »
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

traits.locale_text: [Allumer votre vox] « Tout est réglé ? Dans ce cas, cette audience est terminée. Vigdis, envoyez une navette. »

languages.text: [Voksunu aç] "Tüm meseleler halledildi mi? O zaman bu görüşme sona ermiştir. Vigdis, mekik gönder."
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

traits.locale_text: [Voksunu aç] "Tüm meseleler halledildi mi? O zaman bu görüşme sona ermiştir. Vigdis, mekik gönder."

languages.text: [Dein Vox einschalten] "Wurden alle Angelegenheiten geklärt? Dann ist diese Audienz hiermit vorbei. Vigdis, schickt ein Shuttle."
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

traits.locale_text: [Dein Vox einschalten] "Wurden alle Angelegenheiten geklärt? Dann ist diese Audienz hiermit vorbei. Vigdis, schickt ein Shuttle."

languages.text: [Activar tu voco] «¿Está todo arreglado? Entonces, esta audiencia ha terminado. Vigdis, envíe una lanzadera».
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."

traits.locale_text: [Activar tu voco] «¿Está todo arreglado? Entonces, esta audiencia ha terminado. Vigdis, envíe una lanzadera».

languages.text: 【打开你的音阵】“所有事务都已处理完毕？那么这次会见到此结束。维格迪斯，派一艘穿梭机过来。”
languages.original_text: [Turn on your vox] "All matters have been settled? Then this audience is over. Vigdis, send a shuttle."
